summary: Backfilled durable qd merge commits into done-node completion reports and tightened qd report validation so done nodes cannot keep empty commits arrays while claimed or otherwise non-done nodes still can.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Done-node completion reports with empty commits[] are backfilled with their durable qd merge commit when one exists in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: 58 done-node completion reports had empty commits[] and were backfilled from recorded qd merge summaries in roadmap/qd-export.json; each recorded commit was resolved through git rev-parse and is reachable from HEAD. No done nodes were left empty due to missing merge run commits.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects empty commits[] for completion reports whose node is done in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh now checks the report directory node id against roadmap/qd-export.json and requires .commits length > 0 when that node status is done. evidence/m4-qd-report-done-commits-contract/commands.log records a temporary-copy negative smoke test failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: In-flight/non-done completion reports may keep empty commits[].
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This node is status claimed in roadmap/qd-export.json and reports/qd/m4-qd-report-done-commits-contract/completion.json intentionally keeps commits[] empty while passing qd report validation.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check after backfill.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-done-commits-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing after backfill.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for a done-node report with empty commits[].
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-done-commits-contract/commands.log records the negative smoke test, nix develop -c just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and git diff --check.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false because this is Linux-side repository metadata validation only.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy done-node empty commits[] negative smoke test

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
